title: Codex Global Approval
desc: Set Codex CLI to never ask for approval and permit wkappbot execution with broad allow rules.
steps: Open <user-home>\.codex\config.toml and keep ask_for_approval = " never" with sandbox = \danger-full-access\.
Keep or add the user-level environment variable WKAPPBOT_AUTO_APPROVE_ALL=1 for appbot runs.
Add narrow allow-prefix rules for wkappbot, python tools\\, pip --user, Invoke-WebRequest, winget, and git push.
Prefer explicit allow prefixes over wildcard OS-wide allow rules.
Verify the file is saved and note that the change applies to new sessions.
If the current session still prompts, restart Codex rather than widening rules further.
author: claude
